Episodes.Title: Terror of the Zygons: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry return to Earth in response to an emergency space-time telegraph from the Brigadier, who asks them to investigate the destruction of a series of North Sea oil rigs.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Zygons: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Zygon traps the Doctor and Sarah in a decompression chamber while Harry is taken to the aliens' underwater ship.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Zygons: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and the Brigadier begin to realise who the Zygon imposters among them are while Sarah discovers a secret tunnel to the underwater ship.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Zygons: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: UNIT attempt to track down the Zygon ship while Broton prepares to have the Skarasen attack London.

Episodes.Title: Planet of Evil: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Frederick Jaeger
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah answer a distress call and find themselves on Zeta Minor, the last planet of the known universe, where a Morestran expedition has gone missing.

Episodes.Title: Planet of Evil: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Frederick Jaeger
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor realises that Zeta Minor lies on the boundary between the universes of matter and anti-matter and something on the planet won't let the Morestrans leave.

Episodes.Title: Planet of Evil: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Frederick Jaeger
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor makes a deal with the Anti-Matter Beast to return all the anti-matter to the planet but Sorenson is determined to continue his research.

Episodes.Title: Planet of Evil: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Louis Marks, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Frederick Jaeger
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor tries to convince Sorenson to sacrifice himself for the rest of the crew but Salamar's attempt to deal with the situation causes their problem to multiply.

Episodes.Title: Pyramids of Mars: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Lewis Greifer, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Bernard Archard
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah are drawn off course and, instead of UNIT HQ, they arrive on the same site in 1911 where an ancient Egyptian evil lurks.

Episodes.Title: Pyramids of Mars: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Lewis Greifer, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Bernard Archard
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Sarah and Laurence try to find a way to sever Sutekh's link to the mummies while poacher Ernie Clements finds the priory surrounded by a forcefield.

Episodes.Title: Pyramids of Mars: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Lewis Greifer, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Bernard Archard
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah try to destroy Sutekh's rocket but the Osiran's mental powers prove too great for them.

Episodes.Title: Pyramids of Mars: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Lewis Greifer, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Bernard Archard
Episodes.Plot: Sutekh forces the Doctor to transport Scarman and a mummy to Mars, where the Doctor and Sarah try to stop them destroying the Eye of Horus.

Episodes.Title: The Android Invasion: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Milton Johns
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah return to Earth in the present day to find a strangely deserted village and woods stalked by white-clad figures.

Episodes.Title: The Android Invasion: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor suspects Crayford brought something to Earth in his rocket, as he and Sarah find themselves hunted by UNIT.

Episodes.Title: The Android Invasion: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is captured by Styggron and left to die in the destruction of the fake village but Sarah escapes from the disorientation chamber to try and rescue him.

Episodes.Title: The Android Invasion: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah reach Earth and try to warn the research centre about the Kraal invasion before Styggron unleashes his virus.

Episodes.Title: The Brain of Morbius: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Philip Madoc
Episodes.Plot: The Tardis lands in a spaceship graveyard on the bleak planet Karn, where The Doctor and Sarah find a evil scientist called Doctor Solon is constructing a new body for the brain of an evil Time Lord known as Morbius, who The Docto...

Episodes.Title: The Brain of Morbius: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Philip Madoc
Episodes.Plot: The Sisterhood prepare to sacrifice the Doctor to the Sacred Flame and Sarah is injured while rescuing him.

Episodes.Title: The Brain of Morbius: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Philip Madoc
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor attempts to restore the Sacred Flame to prove his good intentions to the Sisterhood, while Solon prepares to connect the brain of Morbius to his body.

Episodes.Title: The Brain of Morbius: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Philip Madoc
Episodes.Plot: Morbius goes on the rampage, forcing the Doctor and Solon to team up to try and bring him back under control.

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: Members of the World Ecology Bureau discover a centuries-old seed pod buried deep in Antarctica's permafrost. It seems to be still alive, growing without soil. They transmit a photo to London where Richard Dunbar of the W.E.B. sha...

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: With a killer Krynoid on the loose, the Doctor, Sarah and the last surviving member of the expedition concentrate on hunting it down, unmindful of Chase's men who, once they learn of the second Krynoid pod (which always travel thr...

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part Three
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: Surviving two attempts to end their lives, the Doctor and Sarah seek the identity of the plant fanatic who ordered the hit on the arctic base, pursuing their only lead - a commissioned painting of a rare flower left in the boot of...

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: Sarah is saved from a Krynoid fate and runs off, but the same can't be said for one of Chase's men. Not only is he simultaneously devoured and transformed, his fascinated employer will do all he can to encourage the process. The D...

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part Five
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: In the interest in self-preservation, Chase's men side with The Doctor against the Krynoid, but the Krynoid - now bigger than the Chase Mansion - invites The Doctor to join it, promising to leave the others alone if he does. Peopl...

Episodes.Title: The Seeds of Doom: Part Six
Episodes.Writer: Robert Banks Stewart, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Tony Beckley
Episodes.Plot: Chase is obviously under Krynoid control. The Doctor suspects possession but, with the mountainous Krynoid nearing maturity and whacking the mansion to pieces, he concerns himself with the bigger picture and orders the mansion - w...
